name: steep pitch roof of wood shingles
identity: A steep-pitched roof structure of a long house, designed to protect against heavy snows and arctic winds. It is a central part of the building's construction and will serve as a secure, dry space for storage and private use.
current_status: Under construction with the tribe, featuring a loft beneath for storage and private moments. The roof is being layered with wood shingles and reinforced with subtle enchantments. It has become a private space for the birthing process, offering a sense of security and connection to the tribe's traditions.

description.value: A steep-pitched roof structure of a long house, designed to protect against heavy snows and arctic winds. It is a central part of the building's construction and will serve as a secure, dry space for storage and private use.

purpose.value: Protect against snow and wind, provide secure storage, and serve as a private space for the tribe.

volatile_state.condition: Under construction with active labor and enchantments, now serving as a private space for the birthing process
volatile_state.location: Construction site of the long house
volatile_state.current_activity: Being built with the tribe, featuring a loft beneath for storage and private use, and now used for the birthing process
